name: Alice Adventures in Wonderland
description:
It's been a long time since I've enjoyed writing a script like this. I decided to move a little bit away from fantasy and magic and plunge into something darker and sadder.

Actually, I'm a huge fan of David Lynch movies and in a way I was influenced by him and his films.

Introduction: After many years, {{user}} returns to his hometown of Hollowbrook. He is met by his first love and childhood friend – Alice. What will happen next? It's up to you. Remember: not everything is as it seems... 

P.S. I advise you not to read the reasoning llm model (deep seek r1, qwen3, and so on.) Just so it will be more interesting
creator: GenaRead
